title: ANNOUNCEMENT – CHANGE IN THE COMMITTEE EXAM DATE FOR 3RD YEAR MEDICAL STUDENTS
content:
ANNOUNCEMENT – CHANGE IN THE COMMITTEE EXAM DATE FOR 3RD YEAR MEDICAL STUDENTS

The 3rd Year Committee Exam scheduled for Friday, April 25, 2025 has been postponed.

The exam will now take place on Monday, April 28, 2025, at 2:00 PM.

All students are kindly informed.
